red_test: go test ./internal/atlas -run 'TestRecommendationReadbackSchemaRequiresFoundryDeniedTerminalExamples|TestMissionRecommendationsImportBuildsDoubleSizeWaveAndWorkgraph' -count=1 failed before implementation because recommendation-readback.schema.json did not require foundry_denied_terminal_examples.
summary: Focused tests now prove the schema requires structured Foundry denied terminal examples and generated readbacks describe exact missing evidence, stop-gate, and RSI-safe denial cases.
